verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We'll walk life's road together We'll walk hand in hand We'll trust our Heavenly Father As He leads us on, Our love for one another Growing sweeter each day As time goes on, there's only one We'll live for each other

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When we build our family altar Take time to pray As we face life's road together He'll show us the way, His grace is all sufficient Ever leaning on Him, His Word is true His love endures We'll trust Him together
